texto: Martin Luther spent two hours a day in prayer. John Wesley spent two hours a day in prayer. According to a recent poll taken on both sides of the Atlantic, the average church leader, pastor, priest, evangelist, teacher today spends four minutes a day in prayer and you wonder why the church is powerless.
explicacao: Citação de R.T. Kendall sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “Martin Luther spent two hours a day in prayer. John Wesley spent two hours a day in prayer. Accor…” articula lideranca, prayer, reflexao em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
